title: fix_sles_16_branching
body:
Fixing issues we will run into when we branch from main.

The new macro will require a deployment of current OBS code base, so don't merge it before.

This requests includes commits from https://src.suse.de/products/SLFO/pulls/128 to avoid merge conflicts.

title: fix_libarchive_for_i586

Get libarchive building on i586

Removing big chunks of config, which are not used in SLFO, but leading to a lot of confusion.

title: Cleanup python related prefers
body:
There is no python 3.8, 3.9, 3.10 or 3.12 in SLFO. we're on the way
moving out 3.11 so everything should prefer 3.13 and everything else
depreferred
